---
title: "Commercial: Three's a hivemind"
mainfont: Courier Prime
---

1990 McCool FM - :60 second spot

---

__MORG:__
Morg, I’m pregnant and Morg’s the father!

__MORG:__
I know, I was there as I am Morg.

__MORG:__
We are all Morg.

__MORG:__
Morg! Morg! Morg!

__ANNCR:__
Who is the father of Morg? Is it Morg? Is it Morg? Or could it be Morg? Find out in the next episode of Three’s a Hivemind.
